description: Phase 5C Mistral 5-prompt smoke (Mutex, Haiku, 2+2, Translate, Primes)

prompts.name: Mutex Explanation
prompts.prompt: Explain what a mutex is in one paragraph.
prompts.quality_check: Mentions mutual exclusion, threads/locks, race conditions

prompts.name: Haiku
prompts.prompt: Write a haiku about the ocean.
prompts.quality_check: Three lines, theme matches the prompt

prompts.name: Two Plus Two
prompts.expected_behavior: Answer is 4, possibly with a short justification

prompts.name: Translate to German
prompts.prompt: Translate to German: The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog.

prompts.name: Prime Check (Python)
prompts.prompt: Write a Python function that checks if a number is prime.
prompts.expected_behavior: Idiomatic Python function with edge cases
